text: Critical finding: `createClient` only creates a new `RelayClient` if `_client` is null. If it already exists, it calls `configure(options)`. So calling `createClient({ chains: [], useGasFeeEstimations: false })` at module level creates the client with empty chains and `useGasFeeEstimations: false`. Then the `useEffect` calls `createClient` again with real chains — which calls `configure()` and updates the chains. Let me check if `configure` preserves `useGasFeeEstimations`:
